title: quercus ithaburensis subsp. ithaburensis
intro: Quercus ithaburensis subsp. ithaburensis, also known as the Turkish oak or Palestinian oak, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to the Middle East. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus ithaburensis subsp. ithaburensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
